positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) seated in a graceful, confident pose. The fox should have exaggerated, elegant lines and a striking, ethereal fur texture. The background should be composed of abstract, swirling cosmic elements—nebulae in deep sapphire and royal violet, mixed with gold leaf accents. Focus on a high contrast silhouette effect: the fox against a gradient background of deep midnight blue and cosmic teal. Use clean vector aesthetics mixed with soft digital painting techniques. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a striking, repeating apparel pattern. The overall mood is magical, mysterious, and premium. Dramatic, studio-lit composition, vibrant yet harmonious colors.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, grainy, poor anatomy, deformed, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad composition, low detail, cartoonish, muddy colors
